channel.title: Caleb & Brown - News RSS Feed
channel.item: Caleb & Brown opens first U.S. office in FloridaCaleb & Brown opens first U.S. office in Florida, expanding its presence to serve growing American client base.https://calebandbrown.com/news/caleb-and-brown-opens-first-us-office-in-floridahttps://calebandbrown.com/news/caleb-and-brown-opens-first-us-office-in-floridaCaleb & Brown opens first U.S. office in Florida2026-03-05T00:00+11:001772629200000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/3994665dba3cec281cd491e876002133/Caleb%20&%20Brown%20Florida%20news.png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F2wa5FiuMsE0hHQDrtVE9nh%2Fdeb2d5f496bd7ed21774bfa8e749a892%2FCaleb___Brown_Florida_news.pngChris NedelkosCaleb & Brown

Featured in The AustralianAustralian cryptocurrency exchange Swyftx has sealed a deal believed to be worth up to $200m to buy Caleb & Brown, a Melbourne-based, US-focused crypto brokerage targeting the rich.http://bit.ly/4ohIQNwFeatured in The Australian2025-07-03T00:00+10:001751464800000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/db32dff9e82913f5e88f6fb8995a3805/Copy%20of%20Twitter%20Mockup%20Board%20(13).png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F8oe1W48hQwYD5KuOWqMXm%2F6fb8e3d4478e781c2b462f39bc7a4d79%2FCopy_of_Twitter_Mockup_Board__13_.pngCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

Featured in DecryptSwyftx is acquiring Caleb & Brown in the largest crypto M&A deal in ANZ as it seeks a foothold in the U.S. to target high-net-worth clients.https://decrypt.co/327941/australias-swyftx-acquires-caleb-brown-record-anz-crypto-dealFeatured in Decrypt2025-07-02T23:00+10:001751461200000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/57d4f230e44d7565f9e2eb2f5d4728c4/Twitter%20Templates%20Brand%20Refresh%20(1).png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F4jvAdaVdePnQLMfa2IRIpJ%2Fe5b77a2512ef4480a8eea1bc02e0c367%2FTwitter_Templates_Brand_Refresh__1_.pngCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

Caleb & Brown acquired by Swyftx in largest ANZ crypto M&A dealLeading Australian cryptocurrency exchange Swyftx has agreed to buy boutique crypto brokerage Caleb & Brown in a deal worth AU$100m - $200m, targeting the US’s wealthiest crypto investors. https://calebandbrown.com/news/caleb-and-brown-dealCaleb & Brown acquired by Swyftx in largest ANZ crypto M&A deal2025-07-02T00:00+10:001751378400000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/4cd365f07de55e78de6de68509a1b2fd/Portraits-76.jpg?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F5C8nSALnEOUhPLINObN0N5%2F6f0f99c9c8b90a2e4feeb0767e4ab1e5%2FPortraits-76.jpgCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

Featured in The AustralianCaleb & Brown CEO Jackson Zeng gave his thoughts on what investors should watch out for as bitcoin's price reached dizzying heights of AUD$100,000 (US$67,000).https://www.theaustralian.com.au/business/technology/after-cracking-100000-how-high-can-bitcoin-go/news-story/821e1e6c3fa6de5ce0c8a4f465cfbd68?btr=44a0e3801eac0e0c79be4a354ddc9700Featured in The Australian2024-03-25T00:00+11:001711285200000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/db32dff9e82913f5e88f6fb8995a3805/Copy%20of%20Twitter%20Mockup%20Board%20(13).png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F8oe1W48hQwYD5KuOWqMXm%2F6fb8e3d4478e781c2b462f39bc7a4d79%2FCopy_of_Twitter_Mockup_Board__13_.pngCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

Caleb & Brown Welcomes Susi Collas as Head of Distribution, Asset ManagementSusi's strategic approach and deep understanding of the financial landscape make her a valuable addition to the Caleb & Brown team.https://calebandbrown.com/news/caleb-and-brown-susi-collasCaleb & Brown Welcomes Susi Collas as Head of Distribution, Asset Management2023-12-14T00:00+10:001702476000000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/ea1ee1c9446f39a870dbf8045c58ce17/Twitter%20Templates%20Brand%20Refresh%20(1).png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F66b0yEOPTlQVextmWuJC4m%2F671d2714ce39582d1f51726b193889a5%2FTwitter_Templates_Brand_Refresh__1_.pngCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

Caleb & Brown Launches Flagship FundThe Caleb & Brown Flagship Fund simplifies crypto asset investment for wholesale investorshttps://calebandbrown.com/news/caleb-and-brown-launches-flagship-fundCaleb & Brown Launches Flagship Fund2023-08-02T00:00+10:001690898400000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/b69d26ba9989e70039a35b13ff873b7a/Caleb-&-Brown-Flagship-Fund-img.png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F2FJqHG0gI3Pq9gBc6ZyJTN%2F90dfe0a8daea28066d5315fd816617ca%2FCaleb-_-Brown-Flagship-Fund-img.pngCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

Caleb & Brown Launches Inaugural House View Research ReportCaleb & Brown launches inaugural House View research report, providing insights for crypto asset investorshttps://calebandbrown.com/news/caleb-and-brown-launches-inaugural-house-view-research-reportCaleb & Brown Launches Inaugural House View Research Report2023-05-31T00:00+10:001685455200000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/b575d047454c41d24c1b5e13a22304cb/Twitter%20Templates%20Brand%20Refresh.png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F7xHr79ujxoi4JZMDbSxGH0%2F8b620ddf6842ee26e597cf9da1ff7bca%2FTwitter_Templates_Brand_Refresh.pngCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

C&B Director Jake Boyle interviewed by Barron'sCaleb & Brown Director Jake Boyle weighs in on the recent Silvergate Bank news and the broader effects to crypto markets.https://www.barrons.com/articles/bitcoin-ethereum-price-crypto-markets-today-51bf1966C&B Director Jake Boyle interviewed by Barron's2023-03-02T13:00+11:001677722400000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/40e22bec1b454e27dc212f3ea5b33ea1/Copy%20of%20Twitter%20Mockup%20Board%20(15).png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F6gHXsx1ahxGpDPUWU8CEpM%2F490ce25b21782ea48c62dd0ff1571512%2FCopy_of_Twitter_Mockup_Board__15_.pngCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

Featured in Yahoo FinanceCaleb & Brown Chief Commercial Officer Jake Boyle gave his insights on inflation, regulation, and crypto volatility.https://finance.yahoo.com/news/first-mover-asia-bitcoin-seesaws-013345503.htmlFeatured in Yahoo Finance2023-02-23T00:00+11:001677070800000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/d2d037c8dc6d6ee8b213832a872a7489/Copy%20of%20Twitter%20Mockup%20Board%20(14).png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2FnI0Zohq4kC8uXqRzzh9sc%2F915a33e802255d1b10eb10b256136657%2FCopy_of_Twitter_Mockup_Board__14_.pngCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

Caleb & Brown partners with Talos to supercharge its crypto brokerage platformCaleb & Brown will leverage Talos's wide market connectivity, smart order-routing, and proprietary execution algorithms, gaining access to deeper liquidity at the most favourable execution for its clients.https://calebandbrown.com/news/caleb-and-brown-talosCaleb & Brown partners with Talos to supercharge its crypto brokerage platform2022-12-01T12:00+11:001669856400000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/62dd74fab1037acd9d440f9365aa0cca/1.png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F44J6wd9N8vYIOawE5Fet0P%2F4a3c3a21515887e0f3632c9ddb58d43e%2F1.pngCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

C&B Director Jake Boyle appeared on CNBCWhat will be the fallout from the FTX collapse? Caleb & Brown Director Jake Boyle breaks it down on CNBC. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Dt40wa3SyA4C&B Director Jake Boyle appeared on CNBC2022-11-15T04:00+10:001668448800000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/17f7175423d241bfed9feecd32ee2260/News%20Thumnbail%20Additional%20Images4.jpg?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F2eiWKQgS9z09dBuKXR8U2z%2F9a3f94f1f5cd052f65f5dae091e8b922%2FNews_Thumnbail_Additional_Images4.jpgCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

C&B Director Jake Boyle interviewed by Kitco NewsCaleb & Brown Director Jake Boyle explains to Kitco News why the US Fed is the biggest factor influencing cryptohttps://www.kitco.com/news/2022-11-04/The-Fed-and-not-the-new-PM-is-the-biggest-factor-influencing-crypto-in-the-UK.htmlC&B Director Jake Boyle interviewed by Kitco News2022-11-04T16:35+11:001667540100000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/d02e03c6b63a449296f9759c830ff21d/Kitco.jpg?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F7sXcRAu9Fr4EkCuAIa7K9D%2Fff47ed9135a6066664fff0c0ada1259f%2FKitco.jpgCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

C&B Director Jake Boyle interviewed by Weiss RatingsCaleb & Brown Director Jake Boyle gave his insights on whether ETH can overtake BTC and become the top cryptocurrency by market caphttps://weissratings.com/en/weiss-crypto-daily/could-eth-overtake-btc-and-become-no-1-C&B Director Jake Boyle interviewed by Weiss Ratings2022-11-04T06:00+11:001667502000000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/4940383542bfbde776d21d063b1aed80/News%20Thumnbail%20Template%20v211.png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F1UgPW6ZCuv0nhk46dpka2J%2Fb5ffc5bfd73e7a194ba9f4e8810b22f0%2FNews_Thumnbail_Template_v211.pngCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

C&B Director Jake Boyle appeared on CNBC Crypto WorldCaleb & Brown Director Jake Boyle appeared on CNBC to discuss leadership changes in the UK and its impact on the future of cryptohttps://www.cnbc.com/video/2022/10/26/ether-soars-and-google-crypto-winter-hitting-ad-empire-cnbc-crypto-world.htmlC&B Director Jake Boyle appeared on CNBC Crypto World2022-10-27T04:00+10:001666807200000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/982cc3c076225223e373c04504cd6ce0/News%20Thumnbail%20Template%20v28.png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F3Nb8P2sPpRtwjybdHpHxhI%2F84185f187c561d16a8efeb69c2389fc0%2FNews_Thumnbail_Template_v28.pngCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

C&B Director Jake Boyle appeared on Fintech.TVCaleb & Brown Director Jake Boyle appeared on Fintech.TV to talk about the recent pressures on the British Pound, its impact on the overall economy and investors, and the demand for cryptohttps://www.fintech.tv/News/Detail/6522-the-british-pound-and-crypto-with-jake-boyleC&B Director Jake Boyle appeared on Fintech.TV2022-10-19T09:00+11:001666130400000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/01d426776d80ce30eae42c7ce0f40e2f/Finntech%20tv%20newstile.jpg?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F45A3gw4fgU2iGxEtWL5Aou%2F49271c7c82d9b970d7b064bc17cd08b1%2FFinntech_tv_newstile.jpgCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

C&B Director Jake Boyle interviewed by Weiss RatingsCaleb & Brown Director Jake Boyle gave his insights on whether crypto can handle the pressure as it heads into its first recessionary period.https://weissratings.com/en/weiss-crypto-daily/can-crypto-weather-this-global-economic-storm-C&B Director Jake Boyle interviewed by Weiss Ratings2022-10-01T06:00+11:001664564400000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/4940383542bfbde776d21d063b1aed80/News%20Thumnbail%20Template%20v211.png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F1UgPW6ZCuv0nhk46dpka2J%2Fb5ffc5bfd73e7a194ba9f4e8810b22f0%2FNews_Thumnbail_Template_v211.pngCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

LinkedIn Names Caleb & Brown Among Top 25 Startups of 2022LinkedIn's 5th annual Top Startups list is the resource to find the startups to pay attention to right now, featuring 25 Australian companies that are rising to the challenges of the moment and continuing to innovate and gain attention in 2022.https://calebandbrown.com/news/linkedin-caleb-and-brown-top-startups-2022LinkedIn Names Caleb & Brown Among Top 25 Startups of 20222022-09-30T09:00+11:001664488800000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/cfd817c43dac79d022f7f0dda3449b1f/LI%20Blog%20v2.png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F4EKTPOy1Q63Q44TLbk2qJI%2F7d2e077bbd0c18402b324135919e5357%2FLI_Blog_v2.pngCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

C&B Director Jake Boyle appeared on CNBC Crypto WorldHow did the market react to the Ethereum Merge? Caleb & Brown Director Jake Boyle breaks it down on CNBC. https://www.cnbc.com/video/2022/09/16/ether-ends-week-wild-day-trading-white-house-reveals-regulation-guidance.htmlC&B Director Jake Boyle appeared on CNBC Crypto World2022-09-17T04:00+10:001663351200000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/17f7175423d241bfed9feecd32ee2260/News%20Thumnbail%20Additional%20Images4.jpg?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F2eiWKQgS9z09dBuKXR8U2z%2F9a3f94f1f5cd052f65f5dae091e8b922%2FNews_Thumnbail_Additional_Images4.jpgCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

Featured in BlockworksCaleb & Brown has hired three executives to help it expand its services to include fund management.https://blockworks.co/latest-in-crypto-hiring-morgan-stanley-exec-jumps-ship-to-crypto/Featured in Blockworks2022-09-10T09:00+10:001662764400000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/61949a0381bd1edd7950ed9226c50cae/News%20Thumnbail%20Template%20v210.png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F3guBeh56jEaBYO6E662GsC%2F5564a074da7687825b750a27b89bfb3d%2FNews_Thumnbail_Template_v210.pngCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

C&B Director Jake Boyle appeared on CNBC Crypto WorldCaleb & Brown Director Jake Boyle appeared on CNBC to discuss the Ethereum Merge, market volatility, and regulation.https://www.cnbc.com/video/2022/09/01/bitcoin-20000-dc-sues-saylor-nifty-gateway-nft-features-crypto-world.htmlC&B Director Jake Boyle appeared on CNBC Crypto World2022-09-01T04:00+10:001661968800000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/982cc3c076225223e373c04504cd6ce0/News%20Thumnbail%20Template%20v28.png?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F3Nb8P2sPpRtwjybdHpHxhI%2F84185f187c561d16a8efeb69c2389fc0%2FNews_Thumnbail_Template_v28.pngCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

C&B CEO Jackson Zeng wrote an article for NasdaqCaleb & Brown CEO Jackson Zeng wrote an article for Nasdaq on why crypto regulations are a necessary step to mass adoption.https://www.nasdaq.com/articles/crypto-regulations%3A-a-necessary-step-to-mass-adoptionC&B CEO Jackson Zeng wrote an article for Nasdaq2022-08-30T04:00+10:001661796000000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/d8381344323037cb779ee72bc24c529a/News%20Thumnbail%20Additional%20Images5.jpg?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F6MgVYBo7LbhGA2YgzwKl4T%2Fb89e52315aeedccc368df28f4895223e%2FNews_Thumnbail_Additional_Images5.jpgCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

C&B CEO Jackson Zeng featured in CointelegraphCaleb & Brown CEO Jackson Zeng gave his insight on the ongoing Celsius bankruptcy proceedings.https://cointelegraph.com/news/celsius-bankruptcy-proceedings-show-complexities-amid-declining-hope-of-recoveryC&B CEO Jackson Zeng featured in Cointelegraph2022-08-27T07:00+10:001661547600000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/52ebc25c987d7991682db92f28c79255/News%20Thumnbail%20Additional%20Images6.jpg?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F3IMQI8PE19NNNo3mDNltuO%2Fb2b9dd0a7b68ac01a90507db86d779d0%2FNews_Thumnbail_Additional_Images6.jpgCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

Caleb & Brown's New Website & Brand Refresh is LiveAnnouncing Caleb & Brown’s new website & brand refreshhttps://calebandbrown.com/news/new-website-brand-refreshCaleb & Brown's New Website & Brand Refresh is Live2022-07-12T13:00+10:001657594800000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/35877e4e7d72a03a88a60f30566bc84c/News%20Thumnbail%20Additional%20Images7.jpg?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F5cCEFSERxyje27JubJUXPp%2Ff8b010053072d5e88cfc1035705bc6bf%2FNews_Thumnbail_Additional_Images7.jpgCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

Announcing Caleb & Brown’s Client PortalThe Caleb & Brown Portal is a web app which allows clients to view their holdings, track their portfolio performance, read the latest crypto news and contact their broker.https://calebandbrown.com/news/announcing-client-portalAnnouncing Caleb & Brown’s Client Portal2022-06-10T00:00+08:001654790400000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/2ae1afc49482879b097261e8d0ab9bb7/calen___brown_board_thumb.webp?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F7kcggATMeWImLgiOvtxw3t%2F0d9148a64152787468986c52001089c8%2Fcalen___brown_board_thumb.webpCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

Caleb & Brown Announces 24/7 TradingThe initiative tops off an incredible year of growth for the cryptocurrency brokeragehttps://calebandbrown.com/news/caleb-brown-announces-24-7-tradingCaleb & Brown Announces 24/7 Trading2021-12-17T00:00+08:001639670400000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/8ec01a277aca595ac0d7ef6fb07526c9/News%20Thumnbail%20Additional%20Images9.jpg?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F6PzaMkzsQHqX3mrrsQx22E%2F6f8e905c5676c59c1d94c185d3d56989%2FNews_Thumnbail_Additional_Images9.jpgCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

Caleb & Brown Joins the Blockchain Australia BoardCEO Jackson Zeng will lend his vast experience to Australia's peak industry networkhttps://calebandbrown.com/news/caleb-brown-blockchain-australiaCaleb & Brown Joins the Blockchain Australia Board2021-11-26T00:00+08:001637856000000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/9a6852c21f79a60f3cbccf0e5079bb85/News%20Thumnbail%20Additional%20Images8.jpg?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F2FxG1GJa4EsGBhE2YaQjqV%2F8e65d59b9181fdf33103d2d21669efca%2FNews_Thumnbail_Additional_Images8.jpgCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown

Caleb & Brown Powers Crypto Holdings with Verified RenewablesC&B offers an example of broader sustainability leadership to buy renewables to cover the electricity consumption of Bitcoin minershttps://calebandbrown.com/news/caleb-brown-powers-crypto-holdings-with-verified-renewablesCaleb & Brown Powers Crypto Holdings with Verified Renewables2021-01-25T00:00+08:001611504000000https://calebandbrown.com/_gatsby/file/8ef8a84a95cdc8ed650cb5f8b9e141d0/energy_thumb.jpeg?u=https%3A%2F%2Fimages.ctfassets.net%2F4ua9vnmkuhzj%2F66cIAHJCJTw3OHdd2whEqq%2F2173fa9e8cf6316324e3afa1b5557ebc%2Fenergy_thumb.jpegCaleb & BrownCaleb & Brown
